steps.assistant_text: stpcpy-style strcpy (copies through NUL, returns dst-1 = pointer to copied terminator) — 67xxx libc cluster, 40.6%->exact on variant 2. House cursor idiom with loads AFTER the increments: q=dst; p=src; dst++; src++; c=*p; *q=c; — load-BEFORE-increment lets IDO copy-propagate p into src (14-insn form); load-after forces both cursor copies to survive (move v1,a1 / move v0,a0 per iter). q first in appearance order colors q->v0, p->v1, c->a2 (no anchors). Peeled assign-then-while(c!=0) (NOT do-while) gives the rotated guard: first body + beq exit + duplicated body = 16 words.

metadata.verification: 16/16 word-exact (both build paths) + make ROM byte-identical
